metadata.purpose: Hints for agent context initialization to reduce token consumption

context_optimization.lane_filtering: If lane:* label is set, can optionally load only lane-specific guidance
context_optimization.session_history: For task state, consult docs/AGENTS.md (not AGENTS.md root contract)
context_optimization.architecture_deep_dive: Only load full architecture section if working on infra/refactoring tasks

agent_lessons.governance_priority: Always follow recorded repository instructions and governance before improvising process.

project_session_start.rule: When the user invokes project-session-start with a known lane, the first assistant response must already provide the kickoff output. Do not replace that first response with clarifying questions unless a required input is genuinely unknown.
